step.title: Load codebase and test suites
step.action: Read source code and existing test suites, run coverage tools if available.
If a coverage report exists, load it for baseline metrics.

step.title: Identify untested areas
step.action: Identify untested modules, functions, branches, and critical paths.
Cross-reference with test plan if available to find planned but missing tests.

step.title: Categorize gaps by severity
step.action: Categorize each gap by severity (critical/high/medium/low) based on risk impact.
Assess risk factors: user-facing, data integrity, security, frequency of use.

step.title: Generate remediation plan
step.action: Generate prioritized remediation plan ordered by severity and effort.
Estimate effort for each gap remediation in story points or hours.

step.title: Produce gap analysis report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with gap analysis details.
